turns.patient: I've been dealing with this persistent cough for two weeks now and it's really started to get on my nerves. I just want to figure out what's going on so I can start feeling better already.

turns.student: Can you describe the main symptom you're experiencing?
turns.patient: The cough is productive, meaning it brings up yellowish-green sputum. It started dry a week ago but turned wet and green about 5 days ago.
